description: A determined human child who fell into the Underground. Their unwavering DETERMINATION lets them persist through any challenge.

moves.name: Tough Glove
moves.hit: %SN punches %T with the Tough Glove!
moves.miss: %T dodges Frisk's punch!
moves.beginAttack: Frisk equips the Tough Glove...
moves.critHit: %SN lands a devastating Tough Glove combo on %T! Critical hit!

moves.name: Ballet Shoes
moves.hit: %SN kicks %T gracefully with the Ballet Shoes!
moves.miss: %T sidesteps Frisk's elegant kick!
moves.beginAttack: Frisk performs a ballet stance...
moves.critHit: %SN unleashes a flurry of graceful kicks on %T! Critical hit!

moves.name: Worn Dagger
moves.hit: %SN slashes %T with the Worn Dagger!
moves.miss: %T evades the dagger strike!
moves.beginAttack: Frisk draws the Worn Dagger...
moves.critHit: %SN carves through %T with the Worn Dagger! Critical hit!

moves.name: DETERMINATION
moves.hit: %SN is filled with DETERMINATION! HP restored!
moves.miss: %SN tries to muster determination but falters!
moves.beginAttack: Frisk's SOUL glows bright red...
moves.critHit: %SN overflows with DETERMINATION! Massive healing!

moves.name: ACT - Mercy
moves.hit: %SN reaches out to %T with compassion! Their SOUL resonates!
moves.miss: %T refuses Frisk's mercy!
moves.beginAttack: Frisk opens the MERCY menu...
moves.critHit: %SN's mercy pierces %T's defenses! Their SOUL trembles!

moves.name: Butterscotch Pie
moves.hit: %SN eats a slice of Butterscotch Pie! HP restored!
moves.miss: %SN fumbles with the pie!
moves.beginAttack: Frisk opens their inventory...
moves.critHit: %SN savors the Butterscotch Pie! Massive healing!

moves.name: SAVE
moves.hit: %SN analyzes %T! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: %SN can't quite read %T...
moves.beginAttack: Frisk reaches for the SAVE point...
moves.critHit: %SN reads %T's every stat!

moves.name: Real Knife
moves.hit: %SN strikes %T with the Real Knife! A vicious blow!
moves.miss: %T barely avoids the Real Knife!
moves.beginAttack: Frisk's expression goes blank as they draw the Real Knife...
moves.critHit: %SN tears through %T with the Real Knife! The damage is immense!

taunts: * But it refused.
* You are filled with DETERMINATION.
* Frisk smiles mysteriously.
* Despite everything, it's still you.
* You feel your sins crawling on your back.
rest: Frisk sits by a glowing SAVE point and rests.
block: Frisk braces with the Heart Locket.
blockYes: The Heart Locket absorbs the blow!
blockFail: Frisk's guard is broken through!

fatality.preFatal: Frisk's eyes glow red with DETERMINATION. The world shudders...
fatality.fatalMove: Frisk RESETS the timeline around %T! Their existence is erased from this world!

description: A lazy skeleton who serves illegal hot dogs and terrible puns. Don't let the smile fool you — he's the most dangerous monster in the Underground.

moves.name: Gaster Blaster
moves.hit: %SN fires a massive skull beam at %T!
moves.miss: %T dodges the Gaster Blaster!
moves.beginAttack: Sans summons a Gaster Blaster...
moves.critHit: %SN's Gaster Blaster tears through %T! Critical hit!

moves.name: Bone Attack
moves.hit: %SN sends a wave of bones crashing into %T!
moves.miss: %T jumps over Sans' bones!
moves.beginAttack: Bones rise from the ground...
moves.critHit: %SN's bones skewer %T from every angle! Critical hit!

moves.name: Blue Attack
moves.hit: %SN turns %T's SOUL blue and slams them to the ground!
moves.miss: %T resists the blue gravity!
moves.beginAttack: Sans' left eye flashes blue...
moves.critHit: %SN slams %T into the ceiling, walls, and floor repeatedly! Critical hit!

moves.name: Bone Zone
moves.hit: A labyrinth of bones erupts around all enemies!
moves.miss: The enemies navigate through the bone maze!
moves.beginAttack: Sans snaps his fingers...
moves.critHit: The bone labyrinth closes in on everyone! No escape!

moves.name: Karmic Retribution
moves.hit: %T is poisoned by KR! Their sins are catching up to them!
moves.miss: %T's SOUL resists the karma!
moves.beginAttack: Sans' eye blazes with purple energy...
moves.critHit: %T is overwhelmed by Karmic Retribution! Every sin weighs on them!

moves.name: Shortcut
moves.hit: %SN takes a shortcut to recover some HP.
moves.miss: %SN's shortcut leads nowhere useful.
moves.beginAttack: Sans disappears for a moment...
moves.critHit: %SN takes the best shortcut! Massive recovery!

moves.name: Scan
moves.hit: %SN judges %T. Stats revealed!
moves.miss: %SN can't be bothered to read %T properly.
moves.beginAttack: Sans looks at you with empty eye sockets...
moves.critHit: %SN sees right through %T!

moves.name: Blaster Barrage
moves.hit: Multiple Gaster Blasters fire on all enemies!
moves.miss: The Gaster Blasters miss their mark!
moves.beginAttack: Sans summons a ring of Gaster Blasters...
moves.critHit: An overwhelming barrage of Gaster Blasters engulfs everyone!

taunts: you're gonna have a bad time.
geeettttttt dunked on!!!
it's a beautiful day outside. birds are singing, flowers are blooming...
heh. didja really think you would be able to?
you look frustrated about something.
rest: Sans falls asleep at his sentry station. Zzzzz...
block: Sans dodges lazily.
blockYes: Sans sidesteps the attack effortlessly.
blockFail: Sans gets hit! He only has 1 HP after all...

fatality.preFatal: Sans' left eye flashes blue and yellow...
fatality.fatalMove: Sans unleashes an endless barrage of bones and Gaster Blasters! %T is completely overwhelmed! geeettttttt dunked on!!!

description: The GREAT Papyrus! A cool skeleton who dreams of joining the Royal Guard. His bone attacks are fearsome, but his heart is pure.

moves.name: Bone Strike
moves.hit: %SN sends a barrage of bones at %T! NYEH HEH HEH!
moves.miss: %T dodges the Great Papyrus's bones!
moves.beginAttack: PAPYRUS PREPARES HIS SPECIAL ATTACK...
moves.critHit: %SN's bone attack connects perfectly with %T! NYEH HEH HEH!

moves.name: Blue Bone
moves.hit: %SN throws a blue bone that passes through %T's defenses!
moves.miss: %T stays perfectly still and the blue bone passes through harmlessly!
moves.beginAttack: Papyrus summons a glowing blue bone...
moves.critHit: %T moved! The blue bone strikes hard! NYEH!

moves.name: Special Attack
moves.hit: %SN unleashes his SPECIAL ATTACK on %T! (A really cool bone pattern!)
moves.miss: A small dog stole the special attack! %T is unharmed!
moves.beginAttack: PAPYRUS IS ABOUT TO USE HIS SPECIAL ATTACK!!!
moves.critHit: %SN's VERY SPECIAL ATTACK obliterates %T! THE GREAT PAPYRUS TRIUMPHS!

moves.name: Spaghetti Heal
moves.hit: Papyrus shares his artisanal spaghetti! Everyone feels better! (Somehow!)
moves.miss: The spaghetti is... inedible. No one is healed.
moves.beginAttack: PAPYRUS PRESENTS HIS MASTERWORK SPAGHETTI!
moves.critHit: This spaghetti is actually INCREDIBLE! Maximum healing!

moves.name: Bone Cage
moves.hit: Bones erupt around all enemies, trapping them!
moves.miss: The enemies escape the bone cage!
moves.beginAttack: Papyrus raises both arms dramatically...
moves.critHit: The bone cage crushes all enemies! NYEH HEH HEH HEH!

moves.name: Puzzling Scan
moves.hit: %SN studies %T like a puzzle! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: THIS PUZZLE IS TOO HARD FOR PAPYRUS! ...Just kidding!
moves.beginAttack: Papyrus adjusts his battle body visor...
moves.critHit: %SN solves %T like a junior jumble!

moves.name: Belief In You
moves.hit: %SN believes in %T! They feel encouraged!
moves.miss: %SN's encouragement falls on deaf ears...
moves.beginAttack: PAPYRUS BELIEVES IN YOU!!!
moves.critHit: %SN's belief fills %T with incredible warmth!

taunts: NYEH HEH HEH! THE GREAT PAPYRUS CANNOT BE DEFEATED!
I, THE GREAT PAPYRUS, WILL CAPTURE YOU!
WOWIE! YOU'RE REALLY GOOD AT FIGHTING! BUT NOT AS GOOD AS ME!
MY BROTHER WOULD BE SO JEALOUS OF MY FIGHTING SKILLS!
I'M GOING TO BE IN THE ROYAL GUARD FOR SURE NOW!
rest: Papyrus reads a book about advanced puzzle creation.
block: Papyrus hides behind his battle body!
blockYes: THE GREAT PAPYRUS'S BATTLE BODY DEFLECTS THE ATTACK!
blockFail: Papyrus's battle body fails to protect him! NYEH!?

fatality.preFatal: PAPYRUS PREPARES THE MOST ABSOLUTELY COOL ATTACK!
fatality.fatalMove: An overwhelming storm of bones erupts from every direction! %T is caught in the COOLEST ATTACK EVER! NYEH HEH HEH HEH HEH!!!

description: Captain of the Royal Guard. A fierce warrior whose spear attacks and unbreakable will make her the Underground's greatest fighter.

moves.name: Spear Throw
moves.hit: %SN hurls a glowing spear at %T!
moves.miss: %T deflects Undyne's spear!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne summons a magical spear...
moves.critHit: %SN's spear pierces through %T's defenses! Direct hit!

moves.name: Spear Rain
moves.hit: A rain of magical spears falls on all enemies!
moves.miss: The enemies dodge through the spear rain!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne raises her hand to the sky...
moves.critHit: An overwhelming storm of spears rains down on everyone!

moves.name: Green SOUL
moves.hit: %SN turns %T's SOUL green! They can't run! Spears strike from all sides!
moves.miss: %T resists the green SOUL effect!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne's spear glows green...
moves.critHit: %T's SOUL turns green and spears close in from every direction! Devastating!

moves.name: Suplex Boulder
moves.hit: %SN suplexes a huge boulder just because she can, and it lands on %T!
moves.miss: Undyne suplexes the boulder but it misses %T!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne picks up a massive boulder...
moves.critHit: %SN suplexes the boulder ONTO %T with incredible force!

moves.name: Battle Cry
moves.hit: Undyne's battle cry inspires the team! HP restored!
moves.miss: Undyne's cry echoes uselessly...
moves.beginAttack: NGAAAAHHH!!!
moves.critHit: Undyne's NGAAAAHHH heals the team massively!

moves.name: Spear Scan
moves.hit: %SN sizes up %T with a warrior's eye! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: %SN can't get a read on %T!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne narrows her eye at the target...
moves.critHit: %SN sees every weakness in %T's stance!

moves.name: Hero's Spear
moves.hit: %SN drives a massive hero's spear through %T!
moves.miss: %T narrowly avoids the hero's spear!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne summons the biggest spear you've ever seen...
moves.critHit: %SN's hero's spear devastates %T! The power of a true warrior!

taunts: NGAAAAHHH! I'LL DESTROY YOU!
You think you can beat ME?! The Captain of the Royal Guard?!
FUHUHUHU! This is getting fun!
I'll make sashimi out of you!
For everyone's hopes and dreams... I WILL STRIKE YOU DOWN!
rest: Undyne does aggressive push-ups to recover.
block: Undyne plants her spear and braces!
blockYes: Undyne deflects the attack with her spear! NGAAH!
blockFail: The attack breaks through Undyne's guard!

fatality.preFatal: Undyne's armor begins to glow. Her determination surges beyond mortal limits...
fatality.fatalMove: Undyne unleashes a cataclysmic storm of spears! Thousands of magical spears converge on %T from every direction! THIS IS THE POWER OF THE ROYAL GUARD!!!

description: Fueled by the determination of every monster in the Underground, Undyne has surpassed her mortal limits. She will not die. She REFUSES to die.

moves.name: Spear of Justice
moves.hit: %SN hurls the burning Spear of Justice at %T!
moves.miss: %T narrowly avoids the Spear of Justice!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne's spear blazes with righteous light...
moves.critHit: %SN's Spear of Justice burns straight through %T! FOR EVERYONE'S HOPES AND DREAMS!

moves.name: Reversed Spears
moves.hit: Spears appear behind %T and strike from all directions!
moves.miss: %T weaves through the reversed spear pattern!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne flips her hand — the spears reverse course!
moves.critHit: The reversed spears shred through %T! No blind spot is safe!

moves.name: Spinning Spears
moves.hit: Massive spinning spears sweep across all enemies!
moves.miss: The enemies duck under the spinning spears!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne conjures enormous rotating spears...
moves.critHit: The spinning spears tear through everyone! Unstoppable!

moves.name: DETERMINATION
moves.hit: %SN's body melts but reforms! HP restored! SHE REFUSES TO DIE!
moves.miss: Undyne's determination flickers...
moves.beginAttack: Undyne's body begins to melt... but she stands firm!
moves.critHit: %SN is held together by sheer DETERMINATION! Massive recovery!

moves.name: Yellow Spear Volley
moves.hit: Yellow lightning spears arc across all enemies!
moves.miss: The yellow spears fizzle harmlessly!
moves.beginAttack: Undyne charges her spears with electricity...
moves.critHit: The yellow spears electrify everything! NGAAAAHHH!

moves.name: Hero's Gaze
moves.hit: %SN stares down %T with an undying eye! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: %SN's vision blurs as her body struggles to hold form...
moves.beginAttack: Undyne focuses her remaining eye...
moves.critHit: %SN sees through %T completely! Every stat exposed!

moves.name: Spear of Determination
moves.hit: %SN hurls a spear blazing with pure determination at %T!
moves.miss: %T evades the ultimate spear by a hair!
moves.beginAttack: The will of every monster in the Underground fuels this spear...
moves.critHit: %SN's ultimate spear explodes through %T! THE HEROINE NEVER DIES!

taunts: You're going to have to try harder than THAT!
SCREW IT! NGAAAAHHHHHHH!!!
The hopes and dreams of every monster... I carry them all!
I WON'T DIE! Not until I've done what I need to!
Human... No, WHATEVER you are... I will END you!
rest: Undyne's body flickers, but her determination holds her together.
block: Undyne's melting body hardens with determination!
blockYes: Undyne's determination deflects the attack! SHE WILL NOT FALL!
blockFail: The attack strikes Undyne's melting form!

fatality.preFatal: Undyne's single eye blazes like a star. Her form becomes pure light...
fatality.fatalMove: Undyne the Undying channels every monster's DETERMINATION into a single cataclysmic spear! It pierces through dimensions to strike %T! THIS IS THE POWER OF EVERYONE'S DETERMINATION!!!

description: The Royal Scientist of the Underground. Nervous and anime-obsessed, but brilliant with technology. Her inventions pack a surprising punch.

moves.name: Laser Turret
moves.hit: %SN deploys a laser turret that fires on %T!
moves.miss: The laser turret malfunctions and misses %T!
moves.beginAttack: Alphys activates her portable laser turret...
moves.critHit: %SN's laser turret scores a direct hit on %T! S-sugoi!

moves.name: Electric Fence
moves.hit: Alphys activates electric fences around all enemies!
moves.miss: The electric fences short-circuit!
moves.beginAttack: Alphys types furiously on her keyboard...
moves.critHit: The electric fences supercharge and shock everyone!

moves.name: DT Injection
moves.hit: %SN injects DETERMINATION! HP restored!
moves.miss: The DT Injection fails to take hold!
moves.beginAttack: Alphys prepares the DETERMINATION extractor...
moves.critHit: %SN's DT Injection works perfectly! Massive healing!

moves.name: Mew Mew Attack
moves.hit: Alphys summons a Mew Mew Kissy Cutie hologram to blast %T!
moves.miss: %T isn't impressed by the anime hologram!
moves.beginAttack: Alphys holds up her Mew Mew Kissy Cutie figurine...
moves.critHit: MEW MEW KISSY CUTIE SUPER BEAM hits %T! IT'S THE BEST ANIME!

moves.name: Hack
moves.hit: %SN hacks %T's systems and drains their MP!
moves.miss: Alphys's hack is blocked by a firewall!
moves.beginAttack: Alphys connects to the network...
moves.critHit: %SN completely drains %T's energy reserves!

moves.name: Analysis
moves.hit: %SN runs a complete analysis on %T! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: Alphys's scanner glitches out!
moves.beginAttack: Alphys adjusts her glasses and pulls out a scanner...
moves.critHit: %SN's analysis reveals everything about %T!

moves.name: Amalgamate
moves.hit: %SN unleashes a failed experiment on %T! It's horrifying!
moves.miss: The Amalgamate dissolves before reaching %T!
moves.beginAttack: Something emerges from Alphys's lab...
moves.critHit: The Amalgamate engulfs %T! A nightmarish combination of monsters!

taunts: I-I've been studying your attack patterns!
Th-this is just like in Mew Mew Kissy Cutie!
I-I'm not scared! ...Okay maybe a little.
My inventions will p-protect everyone!
D-don't underestimate the Royal Scientist!
rest: Alphys nervously eats instant noodles and watches anime.
block: Alphys hides behind a portable forcefield!
blockYes: The forcefield absorbs the attack! Alphys sighs with relief.
blockFail: The forcefield shatters! Alphys squeaks in terror!

fatality.preFatal: Alphys opens the True Lab. Something terrible stirs in the darkness...
fatality.fatalMove: Every Amalgamate from the True Lab surges forth and engulfs %T! Memoryhead, Endogeny, Reaper Bird, Lemon Bread, and Snowdrake's Mother converge into a nightmarish mass!

description: The Underground's biggest star! Fabulous, dramatic, and dangerously entertaining. His ratings are TO DIE FOR — literally.

moves.name: Dramatic Beam
moves.hit: %SN fires a dazzling beam at %T! The ratings skyrocket!
moves.miss: %T dodges the spotlight beam!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton strikes a fabulous pose...
moves.critHit: %SN's beam blinds %T with pure star power! THE RATINGS ARE OFF THE CHARTS!

moves.name: Leg Kick
moves.hit: %SN delivers a devastating high kick to %T! Those legs!
moves.miss: %T avoids those fabulous legs!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton shows off those gorgeous legs...
moves.critHit: %SN's legendary legs destroy %T! OHHHH YES!

moves.name: Heart Bomb
moves.hit: Mettaton throws heart-shaped bombs at all enemies! Fabulous explosions!
moves.miss: The heart bombs fizzle out dramatically!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton blows kisses that turn into bombs...
moves.critHit: The heart bombs detonate spectacularly! WHAT A SHOW!

moves.name: Essay Question
moves.hit: %T is overwhelmed by Mettaton's essay question! Their mind reels!
moves.miss: %T actually answers correctly! Mettaton is impressed!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton produces a pop quiz from nowhere...
moves.critHit: %T's brain short-circuits from the impossible essay question!

moves.name: Ratings Boost
moves.hit: The audience cheers for Mettaton! HP restored!
moves.miss: The ratings dip... Mettaton doesn't recover!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton turns to the camera and winks...
moves.critHit: THE RATINGS ARE THROUGH THE ROOF! Mettaton is fully energized!

moves.name: Star Scan
moves.hit: %SN critiques %T for the cameras! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: Mettaton gets distracted by his own reflection!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton turns the spotlight on the enemy...
moves.critHit: %SN exposes %T's every flaw on live television!

moves.name: Mini Mettatons
moves.hit: Dozens of Mini Mettatons swarm all enemies!
moves.miss: The Mini Mettatons malfunction and scatter!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton snaps his fingers — an army of Mini Mettatons appears!
moves.critHit: The Mini Mettaton army overwhelms everyone! RATINGS!!!

taunts: OHHHH YES! Did you see those ratings?!
Lights! Camera! OBLITERATION!
I'm not just a star, darling. I'm a SUPERNOVA.
Beauty. Grace. And a face that can kill. Literally.
This body was MADE for fighting! And looking fabulous.
rest: Mettaton strikes a pose for the camera while resting.
block: Mettaton crosses his fabulous arms!
blockYes: Mettaton deflects the attack with style! The crowd goes wild!
blockFail: Mettaton's defenses fail! His ratings dip!

fatality.preFatal: The lights go dark. A single spotlight illuminates Mettaton. It's showtime...
fatality.fatalMove: Mettaton performs the ULTIMATE SHOW! Explosions, lasers, Mini Mettatons, and a musical number combine into the most spectacular attack ever broadcast! %T is destroyed LIVE ON AIR! RATINGS: 100,000,000!!!

description: Mettaton's combat form, designed by Dr. Alphys for battle. Armed to the teeth with weapons, but perhaps not as tough as he looks.

moves.name: NEO Cannon
moves.hit: %SN fires the NEO Cannon at %T! A massive energy blast!
moves.miss: %T ducks under the NEO Cannon blast!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton NEO's arm transforms into a cannon...
moves.critHit: %SN's NEO Cannon obliterates %T! MAXIMUM POWER!

moves.name: Energy Blast
moves.hit: Mettaton NEO fires energy blasts at all enemies!
moves.miss: The energy blasts scatter harmlessly!
moves.beginAttack: Every weapon port on Mettaton NEO opens...
moves.critHit: The energy barrage devastates everyone! TOTAL DESTRUCTION!

moves.name: Rocket Punch
moves.hit: %SN launches a rocket-propelled fist at %T!
moves.miss: %T sidesteps the rocket punch!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton NEO's fist detaches and ignites...
moves.critHit: %SN's rocket punch smashes %T into the wall!

moves.name: Heart Missiles
moves.hit: Heart-shaped missiles rain down on all enemies!
moves.miss: The heart missiles veer off course!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton NEO's shoulder pods open...
moves.critHit: The heart missiles explode in a chain reaction across all enemies!

moves.name: Repair Protocol
moves.hit: %SN activates emergency repair systems! HP restored!
moves.miss: The repair systems fail to engage!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton NEO's systems whir and click...
moves.critHit: %SN's repairs exceed parameters! Maximum recovery!

moves.name: Target Lock
moves.hit: %SN locks onto %T with targeting systems! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: Targeting systems error!
moves.beginAttack: Mettaton NEO's visor flashes red...
moves.critHit: %SN's targeting computer maps every weakness in %T!

moves.name: Lightning Sword
moves.hit: %SN slashes %T with an electrified sword!
moves.miss: %T parries the lightning sword!
moves.beginAttack: A crackling energy blade extends from Mettaton NEO's arm...
moves.critHit: %SN's lightning sword carves through %T! Electrifying!

taunts: This form was designed for one purpose: DESTRUCTION!
I'll protect everyone... with every weapon I have!
Dr. Alphys built me to be the ULTIMATE weapon!
You can't stop this show... it's the FINAL episode!
NEO form activated. Combat mode: MAXIMUM.
rest: Mettaton NEO enters power-saving mode to recharge.
block: Mettaton NEO raises a reinforced arm!
blockYes: Mettaton NEO's armor absorbs the blow!
blockFail: Mettaton NEO's thin armor shatters! Critical vulnerability!

fatality.preFatal: Mettaton NEO overclocks all weapons systems. Warning: CORE MELTDOWN IMMINENT...
fatality.fatalMove: Mettaton NEO fires every weapon simultaneously — cannons, missiles, lasers, and energy blades converge on %T in a cataclysmic explosion! THE FINAL SHOW! THE ULTIMATE PERFORMANCE!

description: Caretaker of the Ruins and former Queen. A kind, motherly boss monster who wields powerful fire magic and healing to protect the children she loves.

moves.name: Fire Magic
moves.hit: %SN sends a ring of fireballs at %T!
moves.miss: %T evades Toriel's fireballs!
moves.beginAttack: Toriel raises her hands, fire swirling around her...
moves.critHit: %SN's fireballs engulf %T in searing flames!

moves.name: Fire Pillar
moves.hit: Pillars of fire erupt beneath all enemies!
moves.miss: The fire pillars erupt harmlessly!
moves.beginAttack: Toriel stamps her foot and the ground glows...
moves.critHit: Massive fire pillars consume all enemies! The Ruins shake!

moves.name: Healing Hands
moves.hit: %SN heals %T with gentle green magic!
moves.miss: Toriel's healing energy disperses...
moves.beginAttack: Toriel extends her paws, glowing with warmth...
moves.critHit: %SN's healing magic floods %T with restorative energy!

moves.name: Butterscotch Pie
moves.hit: Toriel shares Butterscotch-Cinnamon Pie! The team is healed!
moves.miss: The pie crumbles before anyone can eat it!
moves.beginAttack: Toriel pulls a freshly baked pie from... somewhere.
moves.critHit: The pie is PERFECT! The entire team is greatly healed!

moves.name: Motherly Scold
moves.hit: %SN scolds %T with such motherly disappointment that it hurts!
moves.miss: %T has no mother issues to exploit!
moves.beginAttack: Toriel gives you THE LOOK...
moves.critHit: %SN's disappointment devastates %T to their very SOUL!

moves.name: Monster Insight
moves.hit: %SN reads %T with a teacher's intuition! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: Toriel can't quite figure out %T...
moves.beginAttack: Toriel adjusts her reading glasses...
moves.critHit: %SN understands %T completely, like a mother would!

moves.name: Inferno
moves.hit: %SN unleashes a devastating inferno on %T!
moves.miss: %T escapes the worst of Toriel's inferno!
moves.beginAttack: Toriel's eyes glow with ancient fire magic...
moves.critHit: %SN's inferno incinerates %T! The power of a Boss Monster!

taunts: Do not be afraid, my child. Be afraid of ME.
I am not your enemy. But I will defend those I love.
Would you like to hear about snails? ...No? Then prepare yourself.
I was a queen, you know. This is nothing.
You remind me of the children I used to protect.
rest: Toriel reads a book about snails by the fireplace.
block: Toriel raises a barrier of protective fire!
blockYes: Toriel's fire barrier absorbs the attack!
blockFail: The attack breaks through Toriel's fire barrier!

fatality.preFatal: Toriel's eyes burn white. The former Queen of All Monsters awakens her full power...
fatality.fatalMove: Toriel unleashes the full fury of a Boss Monster! An ocean of fire consumes %T! 'I am sorry... but I cannot let you hurt anyone else.'

description: King of all Monsters. A gentle giant burdened by duty, wielding a mighty trident and fire magic. He fights not out of hatred, but tragic resolve.

moves.name: Trident Strike
moves.hit: %SN swings the royal trident at %T!
moves.miss: %T dodges Asgore's trident!
moves.beginAttack: Asgore raises his mighty trident...
moves.critHit: %SN's trident cleaves through %T! The King's power is immense!

moves.name: Fire Rain
moves.hit: Asgore rains fire down on all enemies!
moves.miss: The fire rain scatters harmlessly!
moves.beginAttack: Asgore summons fire from above...
moves.critHit: A devastating rain of fire scorches all enemies!

moves.name: Flame Trident
moves.hit: %SN strikes %T with a blazing trident!
moves.miss: %T sidesteps the burning trident!
moves.beginAttack: Asgore's trident ignites with orange flames...
moves.critHit: %SN's flame trident burns through %T! The fire of the King!

moves.name: Sweeping Arc
moves.hit: Asgore sweeps his trident across all enemies!
moves.miss: The enemies duck under the sweeping arc!
moves.beginAttack: Asgore winds up a massive horizontal swing...
moves.critHit: The sweeping arc knocks all enemies off their feet!

moves.name: Golden Flower Tea
moves.hit: %SN drinks Golden Flower Tea. HP restored.
moves.miss: The tea has gone cold... No effect.
moves.beginAttack: Asgore takes a moment to sip some tea...
moves.critHit: %SN's tea warms his SOUL! Massive recovery!

moves.name: King's Judgement
moves.hit: %SN assesses %T with a king's wisdom! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: Asgore is too burdened to read %T clearly...
moves.beginAttack: Asgore looks upon his opponent with sad eyes...
moves.critHit: %SN sees through %T completely! The King knows all!

moves.name: Trident of the King
moves.hit: %SN drives the full force of the royal trident into %T!
moves.miss: %T narrowly avoids the King's ultimate strike!
moves.beginAttack: Asgore grips his trident with both hands. His crown gleams...
moves.critHit: %SN's royal trident devastates %T! THE KING STANDS UNMATCHED!

taunts: Human... It was nice to meet you. Goodbye.
This is my duty as King. Forgive me.
I do not want to do this. But I must.
...Would you like a cup of tea?
I remember the flowers my son loved.
rest: Asgore waters the golden flowers in his garden.
block: Asgore braces behind his trident!
blockYes: The King's trident deflects the attack!
blockFail: The attack gets past Asgore's guard!

fatality.preFatal: ASGORE flexes his muscles so hard that his armor shatters. His trident blazes with all seven SOUL colors...
fatality.fatalMove: Asgore, King of All Monsters, brings his trident down with the force of every soul he's collected! The earth splits! Fire erupts! %T is consumed by the King's terrible resolve!

description: A sinister golden flower with a twisted smile. In this world, it's kill or BE killed. Don't trust the friendly pellets.

moves.name: Friendliness Pellets
moves.hit: %SN surrounds %T with 'friendliness pellets!' They HURT!
moves.miss: %T avoids the 'friendliness pellets!'
moves.beginAttack: Flowey grins. 'Here, have some friendliness pellets!'
moves.critHit: %T is engulfed in 'friendliness pellets!' YOU IDIOT!

moves.name: Vine Whip
moves.hit: %SN lashes %T with thorny vines!
moves.miss: %T pulls free from Flowey's vines!
moves.beginAttack: Vines burst from the ground...
moves.critHit: %SN's vines constrict and tear at %T! Thorns dig in deep!

moves.name: Pellet Ring
moves.hit: Flowey surrounds everyone with closing rings of pellets!
moves.miss: The pellet rings fail to close!
moves.beginAttack: Flowey's face distorts. Pellets appear everywhere...
moves.critHit: The pellet rings close in and shred everyone!

moves.name: SAVE Steal
moves.hit: %SN steals %T's life force! HP absorbed!
moves.miss: %T's SOUL resists Flowey's theft!
moves.beginAttack: Flowey wraps vines around %T's SOUL...
moves.critHit: %SN drains %T dry! 'Your HP... is MINE!'

moves.name: Face Shift
moves.hit: Flowey shifts to a TERRIFYING face and %T recoils in horror!
moves.miss: %T isn't scared by Flowey's face!
moves.beginAttack: Flowey's expression changes to something... wrong.
moves.critHit: Flowey's face becomes a NIGHTMARE! %T's SOUL trembles in fear!

moves.name: Root Scan
moves.hit: %SN's roots dig into the ground and analyze %T! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: Flowey can't read %T from here!
moves.beginAttack: Flowey burrows his roots deeper...
moves.critHit: %SN knows EVERYTHING about %T! 'I've done this a thousand times!'

moves.name: Run. Away.
moves.hit: Flowey unleashes his TRUE form — a wall of distorted faces assaults %T!
moves.miss: %T looks away from the horrific display!
moves.beginAttack: Flowey's stem grows. His face splits. 'You really ARE an idiot.'
moves.critHit: Flowey's nightmarish assault tears at %T's very SOUL!

taunts: In this world, it's KILL or BE killed!
You IDIOT. You really think anyone's gonna save you?
Golly! You sure are stupid!
I've done this a million times. You can't surprise me.
Die. Die. DIE!
rest: Flowey burrows underground to photosynthesize.
block: Flowey wraps himself in thorny vines!
blockYes: Flowey's vine shield absorbs the blow!
blockFail: The attack tears through Flowey's vines!

fatality.preFatal: Flowey's face melts into a twisted grin. 'You know what would be REALLY fun?'
fatality.fatalMove: Flowey wraps %T in an inescapable cage of thorny vines! The vines constrict tighter and tighter! 'Die. Die. DIE!!!' Pellets close in from every direction as Flowey laughs maniacally!

description: The God of Hyperdeath. Asriel has absorbed every SOUL in the Underground and ascended to absolute power. The Angel of the prophecy who will set everyone free.

moves.name: Star Blazing
moves.hit: Asriel summons a storm of stars that rain down on all enemies!
moves.miss: The enemies dodge through the star field!
moves.beginAttack: The sky fills with blazing stars...
moves.critHit: Stars of pure energy obliterate everything! THE ABSOLUTE GOD OF HYPERDEATH!

moves.name: Shocker Breaker
moves.hit: %SN calls down lightning bolts on %T!
moves.miss: %T dodges between the lightning strikes!
moves.beginAttack: Asriel raises his hand to the heavens...
moves.critHit: %SN's lightning tears through %T! Devastating power!

moves.name: Chaos Saber
moves.hit: %SN slashes %T with twin Chaos Sabers!
moves.miss: %T barely avoids the Chaos Sabers!
moves.beginAttack: Asriel summons two enormous energy blades...
moves.critHit: %SN's Chaos Sabers carve an X through %T! Critical hit!

moves.name: Chaos Buster
moves.hit: %SN fires the Chaos Buster at %T! A cascade of energy!
moves.miss: %T deflects the Chaos Buster shot!
moves.beginAttack: Asriel's arm transforms into a cannon...
moves.critHit: %SN's Chaos Buster overwhelms %T with pure energy!

moves.name: Galacta Blazing
moves.hit: Asriel unleashes Galacta Blazing! Everyone is consumed by cosmic fire!
moves.miss: Some fighters resist the cosmic flames!
moves.beginAttack: Asriel spreads his arms wide. The universe trembles...
moves.critHit: GALACTA BLAZING engulfs EVERYTHING! No one is spared!

moves.name: Hyper Goner
moves.hit: Asriel summons a massive goat skull that devours all enemies' lifeforce!
moves.miss: The Hyper Goner's vacuum weakens!
moves.beginAttack: A colossal skull materializes — the Hyper Goner...
moves.critHit: The Hyper Goner consumes EVERYTHING! Reality itself bends!

moves.name: Angel's Mercy
moves.hit: %SN absorbs ambient SOUL energy! HP restored!
moves.miss: The SOUL energy dissipates before Asriel can absorb it!
moves.beginAttack: Asriel draws power from the SOULs within him...
moves.critHit: %SN's divine healing restores enormous HP!

moves.name: SOUL Scan
moves.hit: %SN peers into %T's very SOUL! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: Even a god cannot read every soul...
moves.beginAttack: Asriel's eyes glow with the power of seven SOULs...
moves.critHit: %SN reads %T's SOUL like an open book! Every secret exposed!

taunts: I am the GOD of Hyperdeath!
I can feel every SOUL within me... their hopes, their dreams...
Do you really think you can defeat ME?!
Finally... I have the power to save everyone!
This is the power of EVERY SOUL in the Underground!
rest: Asriel meditates, drawing power from the SOULs within.
block: Asriel surrounds himself with a SOUL barrier!
blockYes: The SOUL barrier nullifies the attack! The God of Hyperdeath is untouchable!
blockFail: The attack pierces through Asriel's SOUL barrier!

fatality.preFatal: Asriel ascends to his FINAL FORM. Wings of pure light spread across the sky. He is the Angel of the Prophecy...
fatality.fatalMove: Asriel Dreemurr, the Absolute GOD of Hyperdeath, unleashes the full power of every SOUL in existence! Star Blazing, Shocker Breaker, Chaos Saber, Chaos Buster, and Hyper Goner fire simultaneously! %T is erased from this timeline!!!

description: A melancholy ghost who makes music alone in their house. Their acid tears are surprisingly dangerous. They just want to feel something...

moves.name: Acid Tears
moves.hit: %SN cries acid tears on %T! It burns!
moves.miss: %T avoids the falling tears!
moves.beginAttack: Napstablook starts to cry...
moves.critHit: %SN's tears flood %T! The acid is devastating!

moves.name: Dapper Blook
moves.hit: %SN forms tears into a top hat! It flies at %T with spectral energy!
moves.miss: The dapper hat phases through %T harmlessly!
moves.beginAttack: Napstablook's tears float upward and take shape...
moves.critHit: %SN's dapper tear-hat strikes %T with incredible ghost power! How stylish!

moves.name: Ghostly Wail
moves.hit: Napstablook's mournful wail echoes through all enemies!
moves.miss: The ghostly wail fades before reaching anyone...
moves.beginAttack: Napstablook takes a deep breath... oooooooo...
moves.critHit: The wail shakes everyone to their SOUL! So sad... so powerful!

moves.name: Really Not Feelin Up To It
moves.hit: %SN lies on the ground and lowers %T's will to fight!
moves.miss: %T isn't affected by the existential sadness!
moves.beginAttack: Napstablook lies on the ground... really not feelin up to it right now...
moves.critHit: %T is overwhelmed by existential dread! All motivation fades!

moves.name: Music Therapy
moves.hit: %SN plays a soothing track. HP restored... oh...
moves.miss: The music is too sad to heal...
moves.beginAttack: Napstablook puts on their headphones and plays a mix...
moves.critHit: %SN's music heals deeply! It's a really good mix, actually...

moves.name: Ghost Scan
moves.hit: %SN phases through %T and reads their stats! ...sorry for going through you.
moves.miss: Napstablook is too shy to scan properly...
moves.beginAttack: Napstablook floats closer... nervously...
moves.critHit: %SN reads %T's entire being! ...oh... that's a lot of information...

moves.name: Incorporeal
moves.hit: %SN becomes incorporeal! Physical attacks pass right through!
moves.miss: Napstablook can't fully phase out...
moves.beginAttack: Napstablook starts to fade...
moves.critHit: %SN becomes completely intangible! Untouchable!

taunts: i'd just weigh you down....... sorry........
let me try... oh, i messed it up... sorry...
i usually just come here to feel like garbage...
oh no, are you okay? ...was that me? ...oh no...
rest: Napstablook lies on the ground and feels like garbage. It's oddly comforting.
block: Napstablook turns invisible!
blockYes: The attack passes through Napstablook's ghostly form!
blockFail: Napstablook solidifies at the wrong moment! oh no...

fatality.preFatal: Napstablook's tears begin to fall endlessly. The room fills with spectral energy... 'oh... i'm sorry about this...'
fatality.fatalMove: A tidal wave of acid tears crashes over %T! Ghostly wails echo from every direction! The tears form a massive top hat that slams down! '...oh... i actually did it... sorry...'

description: The spider girl who runs the bake sale. Behind her cute ahuhuhu~ lies a ruthless businesswoman with an army of spiders and lethal web attacks.

moves.name: Web Trap
moves.hit: %SN traps %T in a sticky web! The spiders close in!
moves.miss: %T tears free from the web!
moves.beginAttack: Muffet weaves a web at incredible speed...
moves.critHit: %SN's web completely immobilizes %T! The spiders feast! Ahuhuhu~

moves.name: Spider Swarm
moves.hit: Muffet's spider army swarms all enemies! Venomous bites!
moves.miss: The spiders scatter before reaching anyone!
moves.beginAttack: Muffet whistles and thousands of spiders emerge...
moves.critHit: An overwhelming swarm of poisonous spiders covers everyone! Ahuhuhu~

moves.name: Purple SOUL
moves.hit: %SN traps %T's SOUL on web strings! They can't dodge freely!
moves.miss: %T's SOUL resists the purple transformation!
moves.beginAttack: Muffet's strings glow purple...
moves.critHit: %T's SOUL is trapped on the web strings! Spiders attack from all sides!

moves.name: Spider Cider
moves.hit: %SN drinks Spider Cider! HP restored! Ahuhuhu~
moves.miss: The Spider Cider has gone stale...
moves.beginAttack: Muffet sips from a teacup held in one of her many hands...
moves.critHit: %SN's Spider Cider heals magnificently! Made from real spiders!

moves.name: Pet the Spider
moves.hit: Muffet's GIANT pet spider slams into %T!
moves.miss: The giant spider misses %T!
moves.beginAttack: Something HUGE descends from the ceiling on a thread...
moves.critHit: Muffet's colossal pet spider CRUSHES %T! Such a good spider~

moves.name: Appraising Eye
moves.hit: %SN appraises %T with all five eyes! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: Muffet can't put a price on %T...
moves.beginAttack: Muffet sizes up the merchandise... er, opponent...
moves.critHit: %SN knows exactly what %T is worth! Down to the last gold!

moves.name: Donation Web
moves.hit: %SN's web drains %T's energy! A mandatory 'donation!' Ahuhuhu~
moves.miss: %T keeps their energy to themselves!
moves.beginAttack: Muffet extends a collection web...
moves.critHit: %SN drains %T completely! 'Thank you for your generous donation~'

taunts: Ahuhuhu~ Don't look so blue, dearie~
I heard you don't like spiders. That's too bad. Ahuhuhu~
All proceeds go to real spiders!
Oh my~ You can't even afford to lose? How sad~
These webs are handcrafted, you know. Very expensive.
rest: Muffet has a tea party with her spiders while resting.
block: Muffet weaves a protective web barrier!
blockYes: The web barrier catches the attack! Ahuhuhu~
blockFail: The attack tears through Muffet's web!

fatality.preFatal: Muffet sets down all five teacups. The darkness fills with countless glowing spider eyes...
fatality.fatalMove: Every spider in the Underground descends upon %T! A tsunami of webs, venom, and tiny legs! Muffet's pet spider delivers the coup de grace! 'Ahuhuhu~ That wasn't so bad, was it, dearie~?'

description: A ghost possessing a cotton dummy with SERIOUS anger issues. They're MAD because you didn't talk to them. Now they're going to DESTROY you.

moves.name: Knife Barrage
moves.hit: %SN hurls a storm of cotton knives at %T!
moves.miss: %T dodges the cotton knife barrage!
moves.beginAttack: Mad Dummy pulls out an arsenal of magical knives...
moves.critHit: %SN pins %T with a perfect barrage of knives! TAKE THAT!

moves.name: Dummy Rockets
moves.hit: Mad Dummy fires rocket dummies at all enemies! They explode!
moves.miss: The dummy rockets spiral out of control!
moves.beginAttack: Mad Dummy summons rocket-powered mini dummies...
moves.critHit: The dummy rockets detonate on impact! EXPLOSIONS OF RAGE!

moves.name: Rage Stab
moves.hit: %SN stabs %T with FURIOUS ANGER!
moves.miss: %T avoids the MAD stab!
moves.beginAttack: MAD DUMMY IS SO MAD THEY CAN'T SEE STRAIGHT!
moves.critHit: %SN's rage-fueled stab devastates %T! GRRRAAAHHHH!!!

moves.name: Dummy Army
moves.hit: An army of ghost dummies attacks all enemies!
moves.miss: The dummy army collapses in a heap!
moves.beginAttack: Mad Dummy summons their fellow dummies...
moves.critHit: The dummy army overwhelms everyone with sheer numbers and RAGE!

moves.name: Cotton Heal
moves.hit: %SN restuffs themselves with cotton! HP restored!
moves.miss: The cotton falls right back out!
moves.beginAttack: Mad Dummy grabs some spare cotton...
moves.critHit: %SN is fully restuffed! Good as new! STILL MAD THOUGH!

moves.name: Mad Scan
moves.hit: %SN glares at %T SO HARD their stats become visible!
moves.miss: MAD DUMMY IS TOO MAD TO FOCUS!
moves.beginAttack: Mad Dummy stares FURIOUSLY...
moves.critHit: %SN reads %T with PURE CONCENTRATED RAGE!

moves.name: Glad Dummy
moves.hit: Mad Dummy becomes SO CORPOREAL from rage that they hit %T with everything!
moves.miss: %T dodges Glad Dummy's attack!
moves.beginAttack: Mad Dummy fuses completely with their body... becoming CORPOREAL!
moves.critHit: Now fully corporeal, Mad Dummy — no, GLAD DUMMY — DESTROYS %T!

taunts: I'M SO MAD!!! MAAAAAAD!!!
FOOLISH. FOOLISH! FOOLISH!!!!!
You weren't supposed to FIGHT me! You were supposed to TALK TO ME!
DUMMY! DUMMY! DUUUUUMMY!!!
I'LL SHOW YOU! I'LL SHOW EVERYONE!
rest: Mad Dummy screams into a pillow. It helps. A little.
block: Mad Dummy tenses every cotton fiber!
blockYes: The attack bounces off Mad Dummy's cottony body!
blockFail: Cotton flies everywhere as the attack connects!

fatality.preFatal: Mad Dummy's rage transcends physical form. The room fills with ghost energy and knife projectiles...
fatality.fatalMove: MAD DUMMY LOSES IT! Thousands of knives, hundreds of mini dummies, and UNLIMITED RAGE converge on %T! 'I'M!!! SO!!! MAAAAAAAAAD!!!' The explosion of fury leaves nothing standing!

description: hOI!!! i'm tEMMIE!! tEMMIE go to cooleg and now tEMMIE fight in battle!! vibrate with anticipation!!

moves.name: tem FLAKES
moves.hit: %SN throws tEM flAKES at %T!! so yummy but also hurts!!
moves.miss: %T avoids the tem flakes! nuuuu!!
moves.beginAttack: tEMMIE reaches into tEM shop...
moves.critHit: tEM FLAKES MEGA CRITICAL!! %T is covered in flakes!! hOI!!!!

moves.name: tEM VIBRATE
moves.hit: %SN vibrates SO HARD the ground shakes and hits %T!
moves.miss: %T is not affected by the vibrations!
moves.beginAttack: tEMMIE begins to vibrate with anticipation...
moves.critHit: %SN vibrates at CRITICAL FREQUENCY!! %T is shaken apart!! woa!!

moves.name: tEM ARMOR
moves.hit: tEMMIE equips the tEM ARMOR (made with real college education)!! HP restored!!
moves.miss: tEM ARMOR falls off! oh noes!!
moves.beginAttack: tEMMIE went to COOLEG for this...
moves.critHit: tEM ARMOR is MAXIMUM POWER!! heals SO MUCH!! cooleg was worth it!!!

moves.name: hOI!
moves.hit: tEMMIE says hOI! to everyone! The cuteness is WEAPONIZED!
moves.miss: hOI doesn't reach anyone... tEM sad...
moves.beginAttack: tEMMIE takes a deep breath...
moves.critHit: hOI!!!! overloads EVERYONE with cuteness!! they can't even!!

moves.name: Allergic Reaction
moves.hit: tEMMIE has an allergic reaction! Hives fly everywhere and hit %T!
moves.miss: %T avoids the allergic hives!
moves.beginAttack: tEMMIE touches a human... OH NO... TEMMIE ALLERGIC!!
moves.critHit: tEMMIE's allergic reaction is CATASTROPHIC!! Hives EVERYWHERE!! %T takes massive damage!!

moves.name: tEM SCAN
moves.hit: tEMMIE stares at %T!! ...tEM can now see stats!! learned at cooleg!!
moves.miss: tEMMIE forgot what she learned at cooleg...
moves.beginAttack: tEMMIE uses COOLEG EDUCATION to analyze...
moves.critHit: tEMMIE reads %T's stats PERFECTLY!! wow!! cooleg!!

moves.name: Bob
moves.hit: tEMMIE throws Bob at %T! Bob doesn't appreciate this.
moves.miss: Bob refuses to participate. Can't blame him.
moves.beginAttack: tEMMIE picks up Bob...
moves.critHit: Bob crashes into %T with surprising force! ...hi. i'm bob.

taunts: hOI!!! i'm tEMMIE!!!
tEMMIE go to cooleg!! now tEM very smart!!
awawa!! tEM too CUTE for you!!!
*vibrates with anticipation*
yaYA!! tEMMIE will do it!! tEM believes in tEM!!
rest: tEMMIE takes a nap in a pile of tEM FLAKES. zzzz...
block: tEMMIE hides behind Bob!
blockYes: Bob absorbs the hit for tEMMIE! ...hi. i'm bob.
blockFail: tEMMIE gets hit! OWIE!! oh noes!!

fatality.preFatal: tEMMIE's face stretches. tEM is using 100% of cooleg education. The ground shakes...
fatality.fatalMove: EVERY TEMMIE IN TEM VILLAGE ATTACKS AT ONCE! hOI! hOI! hOI! hOI! hOI! An unstoppable wave of vibrating Temmies, tEM FLAKES, and allergic reactions engulfs %T! yaYA!! tEMMIE DID IT!!!

description: A tiny dog inside a massive suit of armor. Part of the Royal Guard's canine unit. Loves pets, belly rubs, and smashing things with a giant spear.

moves.name: Spear Lunge
moves.hit: %SN lunges at %T with a massive armored spear! BARK!
moves.miss: %T dodges the excited lunge!
moves.beginAttack: Greater Dog charges forward in full armor!
moves.critHit: %SN's armored lunge crushes %T! Very strong dog!

moves.name: Armor Slam
moves.hit: %SN body-slams %T with the weight of the full armor! WOOF!
moves.miss: %T rolls out of the way of the massive slam!
moves.beginAttack: Greater Dog leaps into the air in full armor...
moves.critHit: %SN's armor slam creates a shockwave that devastates %T!

moves.name: Bark Wave
moves.hit: Greater Dog barks so loud it creates a shockwave hitting everyone!
moves.miss: The bark echoes harmlessly!
moves.beginAttack: Greater Dog inhales deeply... BAAARRRKK!
moves.critHit: The bark blast knocks everyone off their feet!

moves.name: Fetch!
moves.hit: Greater Dog fetches a BOULDER and drops it on %T!
moves.miss: Greater Dog brings back a stick instead of a boulder!
moves.beginAttack: Greater Dog gets excited! *panting intensifies*
moves.critHit: Greater Dog returns with a COLOSSAL boulder and CRUSHES %T! Good dog!

moves.name: Belly Rub Heal
moves.hit: Greater Dog rolls over for belly rubs! The happiness heals all wounds!
moves.miss: No one rubs Greater Dog's belly... *sad whimper*
moves.beginAttack: Greater Dog rolls onto his back expectantly...
moves.critHit: THE BEST BELLY RUBS! Greater Dog is SO HAPPY! Maximum healing!

moves.name: Sniff
moves.hit: Greater Dog sniffs %T thoroughly! Stats revealed! *pant pant*
moves.miss: Greater Dog gets distracted by another smell!
moves.beginAttack: Greater Dog's nose twitches...
moves.critHit: Greater Dog sniffs out EVERYTHING about %T! Very good nose!

moves.name: Neck Extend
moves.hit: Greater Dog's neck extends impossibly far and headbutts %T!
moves.miss: The neck extends but bonks the wall instead!
moves.beginAttack: Greater Dog's neck begins to stretch...
moves.critHit: Greater Dog's neck stretches across the ENTIRE ARENA to headbutt %T!

taunts: BARK! BARK BARK! *tail wagging intensifies*
*Greater Dog is panting excitedly!*
*The tiny dog inside the armor is having THE BEST TIME!*
WOOF! *armored tail destroys a wall*
*Greater Dog wants to play! ...by fighting you!*
rest: Greater Dog curls up inside the armor for a quick nap. Zzz...
block: Greater Dog hides inside the armor and closes the visor!
blockYes: The attack bounces off Greater Dog's thick armor!
blockFail: The attack dents Greater Dog's armor! *whimper*

fatality.preFatal: Greater Dog's armor begins to glow. The tiny dog inside barks with maximum determination...
fatality.fatalMove: Greater Dog charges at maximum speed in full armor! The neck extends, the spear points forward, and the entire mass of excited dog-knight CRASHES into %T like a furry cannonball! BARK BARK BARK! GOOD BOY!!!

description: An excitable dog guard whose neck extends when pet. Simple-minded but enthusiastic, armed with a sword and an unending desire for head pats.

moves.name: Sword Slash
moves.hit: %SN slashes %T with an excited sword swing!
moves.miss: %T avoids the enthusiastic slash!
moves.beginAttack: Lesser Dog draws a tiny sword...
moves.critHit: %SN's sword connects perfectly with %T! *tail wagging*

moves.name: Neck Stretch Attack
moves.hit: Lesser Dog's neck stretches impossibly long and headbutts %T!
moves.miss: Lesser Dog's neck extends but misses %T!
moves.beginAttack: Lesser Dog's neck begins to stretch... and stretch...
moves.critHit: Lesser Dog's neck stretches INTO SPACE and comes crashing down on %T!

moves.name: Excited Pounce
moves.hit: %SN pounces on %T with maximum excitement!
moves.miss: %T sidesteps the excited pounce!
moves.beginAttack: Lesser Dog crouches, tail wagging furiously...
moves.critHit: %SN tackles %T and WON'T STOP LICKING THEM! The slobber does damage somehow!

moves.name: Happy Bark
moves.hit: Lesser Dog barks happily! The sonic waves hit all enemies!
moves.miss: The bark is too happy to hurt anyone!
moves.beginAttack: Lesser Dog takes a deep breath...
moves.critHit: An incredibly enthusiastic bark blasts all enemies!

moves.name: Wag Heal
moves.hit: Lesser Dog wags their tail so happily that it heals!
moves.miss: Lesser Dog isn't feeling waggish right now...
moves.beginAttack: *tail wagging intensifies*
moves.critHit: Maximum tail wag speed achieved! Incredible healing energy!

moves.name: Dog Sniff
moves.hit: Lesser Dog sniffs %T! Stats revealed! *pant*
moves.miss: Lesser Dog gets distracted by a squirrel!
moves.beginAttack: Lesser Dog sniffs the air curiously...
moves.critHit: Lesser Dog sniffs out ALL of %T's secrets!

moves.name: Infinite Neck
moves.hit: Lesser Dog's neck stretches TO INFINITY and crashes back down on %T!
moves.miss: The neck extends so far it misses entirely!
moves.beginAttack: Someone petted Lesser Dog too many times. The neck is EXTENDING...
moves.critHit: Lesser Dog's neck wraps around the ENTIRE PLANET and strikes %T from the other side!

taunts: *Lesser Dog is too excited to form words!*
ARF! ARF ARF ARF!!! *vibrating with joy*
*Lesser Dog's tail is wagging at dangerous speeds!*
*Lesser Dog's neck is getting uncomfortably long!*
*Lesser Dog has been pet too much! Neck approaching critical length!*
rest: Lesser Dog chases their own tail, which is oddly relaxing.
block: Lesser Dog's neck coils into a protective spiral!
blockYes: The coiled neck deflects the attack!
blockFail: The attack hits Lesser Dog! *sad whimper*

fatality.preFatal: Lesser Dog has been pet one too many times. The neck is extending beyond all reason...
fatality.fatalMove: Lesser Dog's neck extends through space and time, wrapping around %T hundreds of times! The neck constricts and then slams %T into the ground from orbit! LESSER DOG ABSORBED %T INTO THE NECK DIMENSION!

description: The first human to fall into the Underground. Once Asriel's best friend, now a sinister force of destruction. Their smile is not a kind one.

moves.name: Real Knife
moves.hit: %SN slashes %T with the Real Knife! A brutal strike!
moves.miss: %T barely dodges the Real Knife!
moves.beginAttack: Chara raises the Real Knife. Their eyes glow red...
moves.critHit: %SN's slash cuts deep into %T! 9999999 damage in their heart!

moves.name: ERASE
moves.hit: %SN begins to ERASE %T from existence!
moves.miss: %T clings to existence!
moves.beginAttack: Chara smiles. The world glitches...
moves.critHit: %SN ERASES half of %T's existence! Their HP is halved!

moves.name: Creepy Approach
moves.hit: Chara slowly walks toward %T with an empty smile... It HURTS somehow!
moves.miss: %T looks away from Chara's unsettling approach!
moves.beginAttack: Chara takes a step forward. And another. And another...
moves.critHit: Chara's presence overwhelms %T with existential dread!

moves.name: Worn Dagger
moves.hit: Chara strikes at all enemies with blinding speed!
moves.miss: The enemies dodge Chara's wild slashes!
moves.beginAttack: Chara moves impossibly fast...
moves.critHit: Chara's dagger finds every enemy! No one is spared!

moves.name: DETERMINATION
moves.hit: %SN's DETERMINATION restores HP. But it feels... wrong.
moves.miss: The DETERMINATION falters...
moves.beginAttack: Chara is filled with DETERMINATION. (The bad kind.)
moves.critHit: %SN's twisted DETERMINATION floods back! Massive recovery!

moves.name: SOUL Read
moves.hit: %SN stares into %T's SOUL with empty eyes. Stats revealed.
moves.miss: Chara can't read this one...
moves.beginAttack: Chara tilts their head and stares...
moves.critHit: %SN reads %T's entire being! LV, HP, everything!

moves.name: Genocide
moves.hit: Chara strikes down all enemies without mercy!
moves.miss: The enemies endure Chara's onslaught!
moves.beginAttack: Chara's LOVE increases. Their smile widens...
moves.critHit: Chara cuts through everyone! The kill counter rises!

taunts: Since when were you the one in control?
That's a wonderful idea!
* You feel your sins crawling on your back.
SINCE WHEN WERE YOU THE ONE IN CONTROL?
Together, we eradicated the enemy and became strong.
rest: Chara stares at you with an empty smile. They don't rest. They wait.
block: Chara holds up the Locket. 'Best Friends Forever.'
blockYes: The Heart Locket absorbs the hit. Chara doesn't flinch.
blockFail: Chara takes the hit without changing expression.

fatality.preFatal: The screen goes black. Two glowing red eyes appear in the darkness. A single slash crosses the screen...
fatality.fatalMove: Chara ERASES %T from existence with a single devastating slash! The world cracks apart! 'Since when were you the one in control?' 9 9 9 9 9 9 9 9 9

description: The former Royal Scientist who fell into his own creation and was scattered across time and space. He speaks in hands and exists in the void between worlds.

moves.name: Void Blast
moves.hit: %SN fires a blast of void energy at %T! Reality warps around the impact!
moves.miss: %T phase-shifts away from the void blast!
moves.beginAttack: Gaster raises his hands. The air cracks with dark energy...
moves.critHit: %SN's void blast tears a hole in reality around %T! Devastating!

moves.name: Gaster Blaster
moves.hit: %SN summons the ORIGINAL Gaster Blaster! It fires on %T!
moves.miss: %T escapes the Gaster Blaster beam!
moves.beginAttack: A skull materializes from the void — the original design...
moves.critHit: %SN's Gaster Blaster fires at point blank! The original is far more powerful!

moves.name: Entry Number 17
moves.hit: Gaster speaks in Wingdings. All enemies feel the dark truth!
moves.miss: The Wingdings are indecipherable!
moves.beginAttack: DARKNESS. DARKER. YET DARKER...
moves.critHit: The words become real! Darkness engulfs all enemies!

moves.name: Hand Signs
moves.hit: Spectral hands materialize and strike all enemies!
moves.miss: The spectral hands fade back into the void!
moves.beginAttack: Ghostly white hands appear all around the arena...
moves.critHit: Dozens of spectral hands crush all enemies simultaneously!

moves.name: CORE Recovery
moves.hit: %SN draws energy from the CORE to heal!
moves.miss: The CORE energy dissipates before Gaster can absorb it!
moves.beginAttack: Gaster reaches into the space between spaces...
moves.critHit: %SN absorbs massive energy from the CORE! Fully restored!

moves.name: Void Scan
moves.hit: %SN reads %T from across timelines! Stats revealed!
moves.miss: The void obscures %T's data...
moves.beginAttack: Gaster's eyes glow from within the darkness...
moves.critHit: %SN has observed %T across every timeline! Complete analysis!

moves.name: Temporal Fracture
moves.hit: %SN fractures the timeline around %T! Their HP is cut!
moves.miss: %T holds their timeline together!
moves.beginAttack: Gaster reaches into the fabric of spacetime itself...
moves.critHit: %SN shatters %T's timeline! Their existence flickers!

moves.name: Shattered Across Time
moves.hit: %SN pulls %T partially into the void! Reality tears!
moves.miss: %T resists the pull of the void!
moves.beginAttack: The world begins to fragment. Gaster raises both hands...
moves.critHit: %SN scatters %T across time and space! Like what happened to him!

taunts: DARKNESS. DARKER. YET DARKER.
THE DARKNESS KEEPS GROWING.
WHAT DO YOU TWO THINK?
* But nobody came.
rest: Gaster fades partially into the void to recuperate.
block: Gaster phases partially out of reality!
blockYes: The attack passes through Gaster's non-corporeal form!
blockFail: Gaster is forced back into reality! The hit connects!

fatality.preFatal: The CORE hums with terrible energy. Gaster's form becomes whole for the first time in eons. His full power, restored...
fatality.fatalMove: W.D. Gaster opens a rift to the void itself! %T is pulled in as reality fractures! Spectral hands, Gaster Blasters, and fragments of broken timelines converge! %T is SHATTERED ACROSS TIME AND SPACE! ✡︎□︎◆︎ ♍︎♋︎■︎■︎□︎⧫︎ ♏︎⬧︎♍︎♋︎◻︎♏︎
